MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Rubin Roger, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (206)

Appearances:
Jason Cardona, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Daniel M. Bornstein, Esq. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Megan Morrison is present.
Ted Janowsky, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
